title: ASW+NO3 medium
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ddt15","text":"Medium used for cyanobacteria based on artificial seawater (ASW)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1r4lg","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"229fi","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ffo9p","text":"Please refer to our general recommendations to grow cultures :","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cck4a","text":"\nhttps://www.protocols.io/private/A48906DC1374AD6281495CB86A8F092F","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissolve 25 g of NaCl in MilliQ water To this solution, add : %s %s Adjust the pH to 8 with concentrated HCl Adjust to 999 mL with milliQ water Add 1 mL of trace metals (see receipe below) Autoclave the medium
Dissolve all these components separately in milliQ water : %s %s Combine the various solutions after full dissolution Make final volume up to 1L with milliQ Store in refrigerator
creator: Daniel Vaulot
